title: rubus alumnus
intro: Rubus alumnus, also known as the Thimbleberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This shrub has medicinal properties due to its high content of antioxidants and anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus alumnus include its ability to aid in reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus alumnus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
